title: Find My Device - Allow Once - IOS [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location and Geo icons appear after tapping "Allow Once" on Find My Device permission prompt
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset connected.
2. From the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon).
4. When the location permission popup appears, tap "Allow Once".
5. Tap the back button to return to the previous screen.
expected: After step 3, a permission popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't allow". After step 4, the Location and Geo icons become visible on the Find My Device screen.
